name: Immich-Stack
description: Immich-Stack is a tool that automatically groups similar photos into stacks within the Immich photo management system. It detects burst sequences, groups similar images by filename/date, finds duplicates, and cleans up trash inconsistencies. Runs in cron or one-shot mode.

paths.name: Logs
paths.description: Optional log file storage. Only used when LOG_FILE is set.

variables.name: Immich API Key
variables.description: Immich API key. Generate in Immich under Settings > API Keys. Multiple keys can be comma-separated for multi-user stacking.

variables.name: Immich API URL
variables.description: URL to the Immich server API endpoint.

variables.name: Run Mode
variables.description: Execution mode: 'cron' (recurring) or 'once' (single run then exits).

variables.name: Cron Interval
variables.description: Interval in seconds between runs when RUN_MODE=cron. Default: 86400 (24h).

variables.name: Dry Run
variables.description: If true, simulates stacking without making changes. Good for testing.

variables.name: Replace Stacks
variables.description: If true, deletes existing stacks and recreates them.

variables.name: Parent Filename Promote
variables.description: Filename pattern to promote as stack parent (e.g., 'edit').

variables.name: Parent Extension Promote
variables.description: Comma-separated file extensions to prioritize as stack parent.

variables.name: Include Archived
variables.description: If true, includes archived assets in stacking.

variables.name: Include Deleted
variables.description: If true, includes deleted/trashed assets in stacking.

variables.name: Log Level
variables.description: Logging verbosity: trace, debug, info, warn, error.

variables.name: Log File
variables.description: Optional path for persistent file logging. Set to '/app/logs/immich-stack.log' to enable.
